test_cases.description: Commission announcement for European public broadcaster

input.title: The Weight of Silence
input.subject: Three deaf musicians navigating careers in the European music industry
input.quote_director: I've wanted to make this series for eight years. These musicians changed the way I think about sound.

test_cases.notes: Headline factual and within length, lead paragraph delivers full news value. Notes to Editors section complete. No marketing language.

input.announcement: World premiere at a major international film festival
input.title: Margins
input.subject: Documentary following informal economy workers in three African cities
input.quote_director: This film belongs to the people in it. Showing it at IDFA is the beginning of getting it back to them.

test_cases.notes: Festival premiere format handled correctly. Lead paragraph correctly prioritises the premiere news. Notes to Editors appropriately brief.

input.announcement: Season 3 launch of established investigative podcast
input.title: Paper Trail
input.subject: Season 3 investigates a decade-long procurement scandal in a European public institution
input.quote: Season 3 is the most complex story we've taken on. The documents run to forty thousand pages.

test_cases.notes: Podcast format adapts well. Investigative framing adds credibility to the announcement. Notes to Editors appropriately includes listening links placeholder.
